title: Consolidation Batch Output
description: Validates each consolidation_batch_N.json file produced by consolidation subagents

verification.description: Self-verification result — must be 'passed' if all constraints were satisfied

clusters.description: Groups of related suggestions clustered into a single consolidated suggestion

description.description: Synthesized description preserving nuance from all underlying suggestions

importance.description: Highest importance level among underlying groups

type.description: Most actionable type among underlying groups (addition > modification > deletion > clarification)

underlying_group_ids.description: group_id values from input groups — must contain at least 2 (use singletons for single groups)

underlying_group_indices.description: index values from input groups — must match underlying_group_ids in count

reasoning.description: 1-2 sentences explaining why these groups belong together

singletons.description: Groups that do not relate to any other group in this batch

group_id.description: group_id from input — must match exactly

group_index.description: index from input — must match exactly

reasoning.description: 1-2 sentences explaining why this group stands alone

error.description: Present only when subagent failed — indicates the error type (e.g., invalid_json, timeout)

fallback.description: Present only when subagent failed — indicates fallback strategy (e.g., all_singletons)

groups.description: Present only when subagent failed — list of group_ids that fell back to singletons
